workstream_a.title: distribution_blocked 262 棚卸し
workstream_a.summary: 262件全てが release_lane=review_required。主因は HIGH_RISK_RULES の regex が広すぎ + dual-flag 時の verified_count >= 2 要件。

root_cause_analysis.primary: WAR_CONFLICT regex matches overly broad keywords (war, attack, strike, missile, nuclear, invasion, military, troops, conflict, ceasefire, sanction, drone, blockade, naval, airstrike) — any single hit flags the entire post
root_cause_analysis.secondary: 196 posts (75%) have BOTH WAR_CONFLICT + FINANCIAL_CRISIS flags. classify_release_lane line 86-89 requires verified_count >= 2 for dual-flag AUTO_SAFE bypass, but most posts have 0-1 verified external sources
root_cause_analysis.tertiary: Tag-based detection (tag_slugs matching {war, conflict, geopolitics, security, military}) also triggers flags, doubling the hit rate

improvement_candidates.title: dual-flag AUTO_SAFE threshold を verified_count >= 1 に緩和
improvement_candidates.risk: low — editorial_review_advised は distribution_allowed=true だが warning を残す。safety net 維持。

improvement_candidates.title: WAR_CONFLICT regex にコンテキスト要件を追加
improvement_candidates.proposed_change: 単語マッチから phrase-boundary マッチへ。例: 'military' 単独ではなく 'military operation|military action|military force' を要求。geopolitics 記事の大半は 'military' を含むが実際の戦争記事ではない
improvement_candidates.risk: medium — regex 変更は false negative リスクあり。段階的に緩和し、各ステップで manifest を再生成して検証すべき

improvement_candidates.title: verified_count=0 の single-flag 記事に external_url_count fallback を適用
improvement_candidates.proposed_change: verified_external_source_count が 0 でも external_url_count >= 2 なら editorial_review_advised に格下げ。現状は fetchability check が未実装のため verified=0 が多い
improvement_candidates.risk: low — external_url_count は既に計算済み（line 195-196）。fetch 未検証でも URL 存在自体が一定の信頼性指標

workstream_b.title: NAOTO OS ↔ Nowpattern 語彙ドリフト監査
workstream_b.summary: mojibake ゼロ。lexicon v4 は健全。軽微なドリフト 3件検出。
workstream_b.mojibake_check_method: lexicon_contract_audit.py markers (縺, 繧, 蛻､, 讀懆, 莠域ｸｬ) + grep across .md/.py

drift_findings.finding: CLAUDE.md 冒頭で 'Naoto Intelligence OS のルート' と定義しているが、一部の docs 内で 'Nowpattern' を OS 名として使用している箇所あり
drift_findings.canonical: NAOTO OS = OS名, Nowpattern = プロジェクト名/プラットフォーム名

drift_findings.finding: 3つの異なる Brier 平均値が並存: 0.1780 (VPS live/7件), 0.1828 (stale stats), 0.4759 (official binary n=53)
drift_findings.canonical: 公式値は binary methodology (n=53, avg=0.4759)。0.1780 は VPS resolved=7 の部分集合

drift_findings.finding: mission_contract.py の PVQE.V = '価値密度' だが、CLAUDE.md rules/NORTH_STAR.md の PVQE 表では V = '改善速度'
drift_findings.canonical: mission_contract.py (v3) が権威。V = '価値密度' が正

lexicon_shim_status.status: healthy — all shims forward to canonical source

workstream_c.title: Codex handoff

codex_actionable_items.action: Change verified_count >= 2 to verified_count >= 1 for dual AUTO_SAFE flag case, and return editorial_review_advised instead of review_required
codex_actionable_items.test: Regenerate article_release_manifest.json and verify distribution_allowed_ratio_pct increases to ~65%

codex_actionable_items.action: Add fallback: if verified_count < 1 but external_url_count >= 2, return editorial_review_advised instead of review_required
codex_actionable_items.test: Regenerate manifest and check single-flag posts with external URLs are now editorial_review_advised

codex_actionable_items.action: Narrow WAR_CONFLICT regex to require compound phrases instead of single keywords. Suggested: replace 'military' with 'military\s+(?:operation|action|force|offensive|campaign)', replace 'conflict' with '(?:armed|military)\s+conflict'
codex_actionable_items.test: Run regex against all 474 post titles/bodies and compare flag counts before/after
codex_actionable_items.risk: medium — requires manifest regen + regression test

codex_actionable_items.action: Update V definition from '改善速度' to '価値密度' to match mission_contract.py v3

do_not_touch: scripts/build_article_release_manifest.py (production runs only — code review OK)
